mapper.select: select id, coalesce(cargo_weight, 0) as cargoWeight from logistics_order where order_no = #{orderNo} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update logistics_fee set base_fee = #{baseFee}, weight_fee = #{weightFee}, distance_fee = #{distanceFee}, additional_fee = #{additionalFee}, discount_fee = #{discountFee}, payable_fee = #{payableFee}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into logistics_fee ( id, order_id, base_fee, weight_fee, distance_fee, additional_fee, discount_fee, payable_fee, actual_fee, payment_status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{baseFee}, #{weightFee}, #{distanceFee}, #{additionalFee}, #{discountFee}, #{payableFee}, 0, 'UNPAID', current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update logistics_fee set actual_fee = payable_fee, payment_status = 'PAID', update_time = current_timestamp where id = #{feeId}
